headlines.headline: NHL playoff standings: Ranking the top matchups on Tuesday
headlines.description: It's a pivotal evening in the hockey world. Here are the games with the biggest stakes, plus full playoff projections after Monday.

headlines.headline: NHL playoff standings: Who's winning the Atlantic Division?
headlines.description: The Lightning and Sabres are both playoff-bound, but the No. 1 divisional seed is up for grabs. Plus, full playoff projections, draft lottery standings.

headlines.headline: Who will win the Stanley Cup after an Olympic gold medal?
headlines.description: Only eight players have pulled off the feat in the same season. Who are the most likely "double champs?"
